allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'Fix clients view performance — batch stats and add pagination' --body ' *)

Bash(cmd /c "gh pr create --title \\"Fix clients view performance — batch stats and add pagination\\" --body \\"## Summary\\n\\n- **Batch stats calculation**: replaced N async getClientStats\(\) calls \(one per client, each fetching all orders\) with a single getAllOrders\(\) call followed by synchronous in-memory filtering. For 50 clients this goes from 50 DB fetches to 1.\\n- **Removed clearCache\(\) from refresh\(\)**: the cache was being wiped on every search keystroke and sort change. Cache now persists across search/sort interactions.\\n- **Added pagination \(30 per page\)**: prevents rendering hundreds of DOM nodes at once.\\n\\n## Test plan\\n\\n- [ ] Open the Clients section — should load faster than before\\n- [ ] Search for a client — should filter quickly without freezing\\n- [ ] Change sort order — should re-sort without re-fetching from DB\\n- [ ] If >30 clients, pagination buttons should appear and work\\n- [ ] Create, edit, delete a client — should still work\\n\\nGenerated with Claude Code\\"")
